scripts.dev: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && PORTLESS_PORT=443 PORTLESS_HTTPS=1 portless run nuxt dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && nuxt build
scripts.preview: PORTLESS_PORT=443 PORTLESS_HTTPS=1 portless run nuxt preview
scripts.check-types: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && nuxt typecheck
